name: Chocolate Dream Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2 Grease an 8 or 9 inch pan.
3 Melt margarine and chocolate over low heat; set aside.
4 In a small mixer bowl, beat sugar and eggs on low speed for 2 minutes. Add the remaining ingredients (flour, pecans, chocolate) until combined.
5 Pour mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 25 - 30 minutes, or until center is set.
6 For frosting: Beat powdered sugar, margarine, milk, and peppermint extract together until smooth. Spread over cooled cake; refrigerate at least one hour.
7 For glaze: Melt powdered sugar, margarine, and a small amount of water in a saucepan. Drizzle over the layer. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
